text:
- `Space` toggle selection.
- `a` toggle all visible search results.
- `↑/↓` and `j/k` navigation. [...] - `Space` selection, `a` select visible, `u` clear
- Exact-ID batch killing with double-`K` confirmation [...] Assistant: I found the mismatch in code: it explicitly enters the alternate screen and carries pane attachment/input forwarding—far beyond the checklist interaction you described. The correction will delete that whole session-TUI layer and use the repository’s existing `inquire` prompt stack: type-to-filter, arrows to move, Space to toggle, Enter to submit, then an explicit kill confirmation.
